                <td>

                        Fired Jaguars coach rips team on way out the door: 'The problems are…
                    </a>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName7934340" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="Href7934340" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADD6EYMPGU7P6PZ6LW264ZULHXSGJH6YIPTZTXFCTMLCFWPZQ4RPPATKOUILSJMLOS2V4KH7BCWQQ5MDKMB2NK45STUDCWI4NULD4EBOLFSFBFCVL6W4355VTF7PTPBLCH7DY3MVMIRKXZZZTS4KZ4JOYOQDWU6VFNBAB2NNBMDE5KKVXJV6A&" target="_blank">
                                        Yardbarker
                                    </a>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </tbody>
    </table>

</td>

                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
<tr>
    <td height="12"></td>
</tr>

                <!-- Footer -->
                
    <tr>

                                <tr>
                                    <td align="center">

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
